mapper.sql: c.charge_id, c.charge_no, c.patient_id, c.reg_id, c.charge_type, c.relate_id, c.total_amount, c.pay_type, c.status, c.charge_user_id, c.refund_user_id, c.refund_time, c.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT , p.patient_name, cu.real_name AS charge_user_name, ru.real_name AS refund_user_name FROM charge_record c LEFT JOIN patient p ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON c.charge_user_id = cu.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON c.refund_user_id = ru.user_id WHERE c.charge_id = #{chargeId}

SELECT , p.patient_name, cu.real_name AS charge_user_name, ru.real_name AS refund_user_name FROM charge_record c LEFT JOIN patient p ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON c.charge_user_id = cu.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON c.refund_user_id = ru.user_id WHERE c.patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT , p.patient_name, cu.real_name AS charge_user_name, ru.real_name AS refund_user_name FROM charge_record c LEFT JOIN patient p ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON c.charge_user_id = cu.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON c.refund_user_id = ru.user_id WHERE c.create_time BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO charge_record (charge_no, patient_id, reg_id, charge_type, relate_id, total_amount, pay_type, status, charge_user_id, refund_user_id, refund_time) VALUES (#{chargeNo}, #{patientId}, #{regId}, #{chargeType}, #{relateId}, #{totalAmount}, #{payType}, #{status}, #{chargeUserId}, #{refundUserId}, #{refundTime})
